/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/ProceduralWorld.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ProceduralWorld.dir/src/core/Window.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ProceduralWorld.dir/src/terrain/HeightMap.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ProceduralWorld.dir/src/raytracer/Renderer.cpp.o -o ProceduralWorld  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib -framework OpenGL /opt/homebrew/lib/libglfw.3.4.dylib
